ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Apr-03-2020 Off Calendar

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Feb-27-2020 Continued To Apr-21-20 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

1. Notice Of Motion For Entry Of Default Judgment
Off Calendar Feb-04-2020 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing as to defendant Rothenberg Ventures LLC, a Delaware limited liability company.
Dept. 514. Judge: Gerardo C. Sandoval. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty. Reporter: Giselle Casey, #8098. Telephone: 415-551-3680. Email: gcasey@sftc.org.

Leonard P. Mastromonaco, Esq. appeared for plaintiffs Thomas F. Murphy and Martina Murphy, as Settlors and Trustees of the Murphy Trust UDT Dated October 3, 2003.
Michael Ware, Portfolio Manager for plaintiffs, was placed under oath and testified.
No appearance by defendant Rothenberg Ventures LLC, a Delaware limited liability company.
Plaintffs' complaint for Declaration Relief was filed on February 13, 2018, and personally served on defendant First American Title Insurance Company's authorized Agent for Process on February 14, 2018.
Substitute service on defendant Rothenberg Ventures LLC, a Delaware limited liability company occurred on February 22, 2018 and was effectuated on March 4, 2018.
Default as to defendant Rothenberg Ventures LLC, a Delaware limited liability company was entered on April 5, 2018.
Defendant First American Title Company's Answer to plaintiffs' complaint was filed on April 16, 2018.
Notice of Deposit of Funds ($49,490.00) with the San Francisco Superior Court Clerk's Office was filed on June 19, 2018.
Plaintiffs' Memorandum of Costs for $7,255.92 was filed on November 18, 2019.
DOE defendants were dismissed on November 18, 2019.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiffs Thomas F. Murphy and Martina Murphy, as Settlors and Trustees of the Murphy Trust UDT Dated October 3, 2003, and against the Defaulted Defendant Rothenberg Ventures LLC, a Delaware limited liability company, as follows:

Damages/Principal - $50,000.00.
Prejudgment Interest - $15,165.90.
Attorney Fees - $7,725.00.
Costs - $1,030.90.
Total - $73,921.80.

Additionally, it is further Ordered and Adjudged that the Clerk of this Court shall release to Plaintiffs the sum of $49,490.00 deposited by First American Title Insurance Company on June 18, 2018, identified as TRAN #W161861D009, TAG #035404. The address for delivery of the $49,490.00 is Thomas Murphy Trustee, c/o Aralon Properties, Attn. Michael Ware, 482 Bryant Street, San Francisco, CA 94107.

Counsel for plaintiffs shall prepare the proposed Judgment and submit same to the Court for review and signature.
